entities.name: SATCRIS
entities.description: The Semi-Arid Tropical Crops Information Service project providing information products and services

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DATABASES
entities.description: Databases containing agricultural information used by SATCRIS

entities.name: FOOD SCIENCE DATABASES
entities.description: Databases containing food science information used by SATCRIS

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL SCIENCE DATABASES
entities.description: Databases containing biological science information used by SATCRIS

entities.name: TIME-SERIES DATABASE
entities.description: A database structure for tracking crop data over time mandated to ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: SELECTIVE DISSEMINATION OF INFORMATION
entities.description: An automated service (SDI) operated by SATCRIS to provide targeted information

entities.name: EXPERT ADVISORY SYSTEM
entities.description: A prototype system for the identification and control of groundnut diseases

entities.name: GROUNDNUT DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases affecting groundnut crops that the expert advisory system aims to identify and control

entities.name: AFLATOXIN
entities.description: A toxin problem in groundnuts for which SATCRIS created a specialized database

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The region where information users are to be sensitized to SATCRIS resources
